name: brand-kit
description: Complete brand kit builder. Computed DOM extraction, brand-styled HTML deliverable. After first build, installs a user.md usage instruction so future branded outputs auto-consult the brand-kit library.

installs.purpose: Generic structural reference the skill points to for section-by-section depth
Local routing index for saved brand kits

Global INDEX.md routing entry for the saved-kits library. The skill itself is auto-discovered via Runneth's available-skills mechanism and is intentionally not indexed (per Runneth's rule: do not index /agent/.agents/skills/).

runtime_installs.trigger: After the first successful brand-kit build, idempotent across subsequent builds
runtime_installs.purpose: Standing instruction so future branded outputs (HTML, landing pages, decks, ads, emails, briefs) auto-consult the brand-kit library and feel native to the target brand

changes: Hardcoded motionapp.com north-star references removed; generic reference-example.md ships instead
Dynamic Playwright NODE_PATH discovery, no hardcoded cache hash
YAML frontmatter stripped of model: opus and skill-local allowed-tools for plug-and-play default capabilities
Step 4.5: idempotent user.md usage-snippet append so brand kits become an active primitive, not an inert file
Archive-before-overwrite into per-brand _history/ folder as in-system changelog
Updates both local _index.md and global /agent/INDEX.md on every durable save
Cross-skill dependency: always invokes landing-page-summary fresh, never reads a saved summary directly
